description: Use this API to modify the zero sequence data of an existing fixed bus shunt in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zero Sequence Fixed Shunt Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = seq_fixed_shunt_data(ibus, id, realar)

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

realar.description: GSZERO, active power component of fixed shunt zero sequence admittance (conductance).
BSZERO, reactive power component of fixed shunt zero sequence admittance (susceptance).

error_codes.description: shunt identifier is more than two characters.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Admittance components with different signs in the positive and zero sequences.
